doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the EEOC Compliance Manual covers Retaliation, and the provided text uses modern phrasing regarding social platforms not present in official 2018 guidelines.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EEOC Compliance Manual's Section 8 is dedicated to "Retaliation," not "Age Discrimination," and the specific language regarding graduation year filters is not part of that official document.
